name: PDGMS Thread Quality Rubric
description: Scoring rubric for evaluating Question → Hypothesis → Experiment threads in the Socratic Dialogue LMS

criteria.name: Question Clarity
criteria.description: Is the question specific, observable, and meaningful?

levels.label: Vague
levels.descriptor: Question is too broad or unclear to guide inquiry

levels.label: General
levels.descriptor: Question has direction but lacks specificity

levels.label: Focused
levels.descriptor: Question is clear but could be more precise

levels.label: Specific
levels.descriptor: Question is clear, specific, and leads to inquiry

levels.label: Exceptional
levels.descriptor: Question is precise, observable, and drives meaningful exploration

criteria.name: Hypothesis Testability
criteria.description: Is the hypothesis falsifiable and measurable?

levels.label: Untestable
levels.descriptor: Cannot be tested or measured

levels.label: Partially Testable
levels.descriptor: Some measurable elements but vague

levels.label: Testable
levels.descriptor: Can be tested with some additional refinement

levels.label: Measurable
levels.descriptor: Clear, measurable, and falsifiable

levels.label: Scientific
levels.descriptor: Fully falsifiable with quantitative success criteria

criteria.name: Experiment Design
criteria.description: Is the experiment well-structured with controls and measurable outcomes?

levels.label: No Design
levels.descriptor: No clear experimental structure

levels.label: Basic
levels.descriptor: Some structure but missing controls

levels.label: Structured
levels.descriptor: Has controls and outcomes but not rigorous

levels.label: Rigorous
levels.descriptor: Well-controlled with clear measurement plan

levels.label: Excellent
levels.descriptor: Fully controlled, reproducible, with statistical validity plan

criteria.name: Evidence Quality
criteria.description: Is the reasoning grounded in evidence and free from unsupported claims?

levels.label: No Evidence
levels.descriptor: Claims made without any grounding

levels.label: Anecdotal
levels.descriptor: Based on personal experience only

levels.label: Referenced
levels.descriptor: Some evidence cited but not rigorous

levels.label: Evidence-Based
levels.descriptor: Claims supported by credible references

levels.label: Rigorous
levels.descriptor: All claims traceable to verifiable evidence
